title: BlockHardcore | Extreme
body:
# BlockHardcore is an EXTREME Hardcore modpack. 
**Builds and Explore with the fear of death !**
  Transform your adventure with difficults mechanics like hydratation, food spoiling or temperature! Discover a whole new world with Tectonic, Geophilic, Terralith, Better End, Deep and Darker and much more ! This pack is for those who wants to CHALLENGE themselves. You can't regenerate naturally, you need to consums health potions or golden apples. The mobs are much more stronger and they will improve as you play !  There are a lot of structures and a lot of optimisation mods.
  
**This modpack is optimized.** 
 ** This modpack is in release but if you have questions or request feel free to contact me on discord Izouku ;) **
